name: ESPEY MFG & ELECTRONICS CORP
summary: Espey Mfg. & Electronics Corp. is a power electronics design and OEM company founded in 1928, specializing in highly reliable products for military and severe environment applications. The company designs and manufactures power supplies, power converters, filters, power transformers, magnetic components, power distribution equipment, UPS systems, and antennas. Products serve AC/DC locomotives, shipboard power, shipboard radar, airborne power, and ground-based radar. Total sales were $43.95 million in fiscal year 2025, with a backlog of $139.7 million.

products.name: Power Supplies
products.description: High-reliability power supplies for military and industrial applications including airborne and shipboard use.

products.name: Power Converters
products.description: Power conversion units for military and severe environment applications.

products.name: Power Transformers
products.description: Advanced magnetic transformers for rugged military and industrial environments.

products.name: Magnetic Components / Inductors
products.description: Custom magnetic components and inductors manufactured in-house as part of vertical integration.

products.name: Filters
products.description: Electronic filters for power applications in military and industrial markets.

products.name: Power Distribution Equipment
products.description: Equipment for distributing electrical power in military and industrial systems.

products.name: UPS Systems
products.description: Uninterruptible power supply systems for rugged and military applications.

products.name: Antennas
products.description: Antennas designed for military and industrial use.

products.name: Automatic Testing Equipment
products.description: Custom-developed automatic testing equipment for product qualification and testing.

products.name: Design and Development Services
products.description: Custom engineering design and development to customer specifications for military and industrial products.

products.name: Environmental Testing Services
products.description: In-house environmental testing services for mechanical, electrical, and environmental qualification.

products.name: Metal Fabrication and Painting
products.description: In-house metal fabrication and painting services as part of vertical integration.
